name: Monday.com
api_notes: The API is a comprehensive GraphQL interface covering boards, items, subitems, users, and workflows. Official SDKs for Node.js are available.
access_notes: Developers can create a free developer account to access API tools and the API playground without expiration. Admin/member personal API tokens can be generated through the account UI. OAuth is also supported for app-based integrations.
auth_notes: Supports personal API tokens (API keys) and OAuth 2.0 authorization flows. Short-lived tokens are also used for specific authentication scenarios.

evidence.claim: The monday.com Platform API is an expressive GraphQL API to interact with workflows, automate processes, and power integrations.
Authentication is handled via Personal API tokens (API keys) or OAuth 2.0.

one_liner: Monday.com is a work operating system providing a comprehensive GraphQL API for managing workflows, boards, items, and integrations.
mcp_notes: No official or well-known community Model Context Protocol server was identified in the provided sources.
